On this page

MacOS Standalone OneDrive Updates ​

Last Updated: April 14, 2026 07:28 AM EDT Raw XML (Automatically Updated every 2 hours)

NOTE

I have yet to locate a reliable pull source that is direct from Microsoft, so I pulled from the only sources I could to provide this table. The table is as accurate as the data sources direct from Microsoft. I know there is an API way of pulling data, and I require assistance to set that up. For now, this is as accurate as I can provide. Here is another good source that can provide more information: Hans Brender's OneDrive Versions.

IMPORTANT

This page is fully automated and updated through a script. To modify the content, the script itself must be updated. The information presented here is generated automatically based on the most recent data available from Microsoft. Please note that it may not always reflect complete accuracy. To access and edit the scripts, please visit the scripts folder here.
